data.title: Pureprofile to Outline AI Strategy at Investor Webinar
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Pureprofile Ltd. ( (AU:PPL) ) has issued an update.

Pureprofile Ltd, an Australia-based data and insights company founded in 2000, specialises in online research and consumer profiling through its ResTech and SaaS solutions for more than 750 clients worldwide. The business focuses on extracting rich behavioural insights to explain the reasons behind consumer actions, supporting marketers and researchers across multiple major regions.

The company has been selected to present at an investor webinar titled “AI in Action: How ASX Companies Are Leveraging Artificial Intelligence,” hosted by RAAS Research Group. Managing director Martin Filz will outline Pureprofile’s artificial intelligence strategy and its expected role in the firm’s future operations, with investors gaining further clarity on how AI may shape the company’s growth through a live Q&A and an on-demand recording after the event.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:PPL) stock is a Hold with a A$0.04 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pureprofile Ltd. stock, see the AU:PPL Stock Forecast page.

More about Pureprofile Ltd.

Pureprofile Ltd is a global data and insights organisation that provides online research solutions to agencies, marketers, researchers, brands and businesses. Its ResTech and SaaS platforms use proprietary and partner panels to build detailed consumer profiles, helping clients understand, target and engage audiences across North America, Europe and the Asia-Pacific region.

Average Trading Volume: 1,351,644

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$42.69M

data.title: Finder Energy Director Converts Options to Boost Shareholding
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Finder Energy Holdings Limited ( (AU:FDR) ) has issued an announcement.

Finder Energy Holdings Limited has reported a change in director Frederick Wehr’s indirect interests in the company’s securities, following the exercise of options held through his related entities. Wehr Advisory Pty Ltd, wholly owned by Mr Wehr, converted 350,000 options into fully paid ordinary shares at a total consideration of A$105,000, increasing its shareholding while eliminating that specific option parcel.

After the transaction, Mr Wehr’s indirect holdings comprise 350,000 fully paid ordinary shares and two remaining tranches of 500,000 options each held via Wehr Advisory, alongside 556,081 fully paid ordinary shares held jointly with Mrs Nicola Wehr. The move modestly reshapes the director’s equity exposure by shifting part of his position from options to ordinary shares, aligning his interests more closely with existing shareholders and marginally increasing the free float of listed stock.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:FDR) stock is a Hold with a A$0.60 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Finder Energy Holdings Limited stock, see the AU:FDR Stock Forecast page.

More about Finder Energy Holdings Limited

Finder Energy Holdings Limited operates in the energy sector, focusing on oil and gas exploration and development activities. The company’s securities are listed on the ASX, and it uses equity and options-based incentives as part of its capital management and executive remuneration structures.

Average Trading Volume: 789,348

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$277M

data.title: CDL Investments posts solid 2025 result and builds pipeline amid soft housing market
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from CDL Investments NZ ( (NZ:CDI) ).

CDL Investments New Zealand Limited, a national land developer specialising in residential, retail and industrial projects, continues to advance a substantial pipeline in growth regions such as Auckland, Hamilton, Hawke’s Bay and Canterbury. Its diversification into industrial and commercial assets is designed to provide earnings resilience across property cycles while maintaining a strong balance sheet and governance structure.

The company’s 2025 Annual Report shows profit after tax of $11.1 million on revenue and other income of $38.1 million, reflecting subdued residential market conditions and softer section sales. Despite the downturn, CDI reports no debt, stable shareholders’ funds of $321.2 million, ongoing progress on key developments in Christchurch and Havelock North, and has declared a fully imputed dividend of 1 cent per share while positioning its pipeline to benefit from a gradual market recovery.

CDI highlighted that planning and land-use changes at national and regional levels are lengthening timeframes, but it is using mechanisms such as Fast-track consents for projects in Havelock North and advancing the Ruakura 2 growth cell in Hamilton to secure future supply. The board remains cautiously optimistic, emphasising that its strong balance sheet, refreshed governance and well-prepared developments should support earnings resilience and allow it to capitalise on the next phase of the property cycle.

More about CDL Investments NZ

CDL Investments New Zealand Limited is a nationwide land developer with more than 30 years’ experience delivering residential, retail and industrial developments across New Zealand. The company focuses on disciplined capital allocation, careful project execution and long-term value creation, with a diversified portfolio across key growth regions and is majority owned by Millennium & Copthorne Hotels New Zealand Limited.

Average Trading Volume: 16,797

Current Market Cap: N$207.8M

data.title: Yowie Ends Long-Running Whetstone Legal Battle With Favourable Settlement
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Yowie Group ( (AU:YOW) ).

Yowie Group has reached a final settlement in its long-running legal dispute with Whetstone Industries, Inc., Henry Whetstone Jr. and Atlantic Candy Company, ending litigation that stemmed from the termination of a business relationship in 2015. The confidential settlement has been resolved in Yowie’s favour with a nominal payment to the company, and the parties will file to dismiss the case with prejudice.

By closing this legacy matter, Yowie’s board removes a significant distraction and advances its broader effort to clean up historic issues, freeing management to concentrate on its core confectionery operations and growth strategy. The resolution is likely to support operational focus and may enhance the company’s positioning as it seeks to scale manufacturing, expand distribution in key markets and selectively pursue international growth.

More about Yowie Group

Yowie Group Limited is an Australian-based chocolate and confectionery company operating in branded consumer products, licensing and manufacturing. It designs, manufactures and distributes chocolate and confectionery across Australia, New Zealand and the United States under its flagship Yowie brand, and since late 2023 has owned Ernest Hillier to provide in-house production and support portfolio expansion.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$3.21M

data.title: CENTRAL REIT Completes Third-Party Allotment to Fund New Property Acquisitions
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from XYMAX REIT Investment Corp. ( (JP:3488) ) is now available.

CENTRAL REIT Investment Corporation has completed a third-party allotment of 13,140 new investment units to MEITETSU CITY DESIGN CO., LTD., raising approximately 1.52 billion yen at an issue price of 116,027 yen per unit. As a result, the total number of issued and outstanding investment units increased from 249,650 to 262,790, modestly diluting existing holdings while strengthening the REIT’s capital base.

The proceeds will be used to help fund the acquisition and related expenses of domestic real estate assets, including interests in ENISHIO MEIEKI and the Kamimaezu KD Building, as previously announced. This targeted capital raise supports CENTRAL REIT’s growth strategy in Japan’s property market, positioning the vehicle to expand its portfolio and potentially enhance future income streams for investors through increased scale and asset diversification.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:3488) stock is a Hold with a Yen119068.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on XYMAX REIT Investment Corp. stock, see the JP:3488 Stock Forecast page.

More about XYMAX REIT Investment Corp.

CENTRAL REIT Investment Corporation is a Japanese real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on acquiring and operating domestic real estate assets. Managed by MEITETSU XYMAX ASSET MANAGEMENT CO., LTD., the trust invests in income-generating properties in Japan, aiming to provide stable returns to its unitholders through disciplined portfolio expansion.

data.title: Tokenwell Platforms Launches $600,000 Convertible Debenture Financing
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Ambari Brands, Inc. ( (TSE:TWEL) ).

Tokenwell Platforms Inc. has launched a non-brokered private placement of unsecured convertible debentures, aiming to raise up to $600,000 to support general working capital. The debentures carry a 10% annual interest rate, mature in 12 months, and may be converted into common shares at $0.06 per share at any time up to maturity.

The financing is expected to close by mid-April 2026, subject to regulatory and other customary approvals, and may include finders’ fees for eligible intermediaries. All securities issued will be subject to a four-month-plus-one-day hold period, underscoring standard Canadian securities law constraints for early investors in the offering.

More about Ambari Brands, Inc.

Tokenwell Platforms Inc. is a publicly listed cryptocurrency platform that focuses on making digital assets accessible, secure, and efficient for users worldwide. The company emphasizes innovation and user-centric design, enabling individuals and businesses to participate in the crypto economy through its app and related digital asset services.

The latest announcement is out from PYC Therapeutics Limited ( (AU:PYC) ).

PYC Therapeutics has disclosed a change in the holdings of director Dr Rohan Hockings, who acquired 82,550 fully paid shares via an on-market purchase, increasing his direct stake from 213,360 to 295,910 shares. The transaction, valued at $99,883, signals a higher personal financial commitment by the chief executive to the company’s equity.

In addition, Dr Hockings has been offered 1.5 million unlisted options under the company’s Long Term Incentive Plan, exercisable at $2.52 within 48 months, with vesting scheduled in two tranches after 12 and 24 months subject to shareholder approval. This structure is designed to incentivise long-term performance and further align management interests with those of shareholders, potentially impacting future dilution and executive retention dynamics.

Multistack International Limited ( (AU:MSI) ) has provided an announcement.

Multistack International has lodged its financial information for the year ended 31 December 2025 with the ASX, along with its corporate governance statement included in the company’s annual report. The statement, current as at 31 December 2025 and approved by the board, outlines the extent of the company’s adherence to ASX Corporate Governance Council recommendations.

The company has also submitted an Appendix 4G, which serves as a key to locate its governance disclosures and as a verification tool confirming compliance with Listing Rule 4.10.3. data.title: PesoRama pushes Mexico expansion with two new JOi Dollar Plus stores
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from PesoRama Inc ( (TSE:PESO) ) is now available.

PesoRama is expanding its JOi Dollar Plus chain in Mexico with the opening of its 34th and 35th stores, reinforcing its footprint in key high-traffic urban markets. The company, which already operates 33 locations, continues to pursue a strategy focused on dense commercial and residential areas to capture value-conscious consumers.

Store #34 will open in Puebla’s historic center, a busy commercial and tourist hub, marking PesoRama’s second location in that state and deepening its regional presence. Store #35 will be launched inside the Parque Tepeyac retail complex in northeast Mexico City, a high-density area with more than 100 commercial establishments, underscoring the chain’s push to drive growth through strategic site selection and greater accessibility for Mexican shoppers.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:PESO) stock is a Hold with a C$0.35 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on PesoRama Inc stock, see the TSE:PESO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PESO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PESO is a Neutral.

PesoRama Inc’s overall stock score is primarily impacted by its weak financial performance, characterized by high leverage and negative profitability. While technical analysis shows some positive momentum, the valuation metrics highlight significant risks due to the company’s lack of profitability. The absence of earnings call and corporate events data limits additional insights.

To see Spark’s full report on PESO stock, click here.

More about PesoRama Inc

PesoRama Inc. is a Canadian-founded value dollar store retailer operating in Mexico under the JOi Dollar Plus brand. Launched in 2019 in Mexico City and surrounding areas, it targets high-density, high-traffic locations with a consistent assortment of low-cost household goods, pet supplies, seasonal and party items, health and beauty products, snacks, confectionery and related everyday merchandise.
